description: baseline: add synthetic workspace-sync memory benchmark harness
split workspace sync/status into hash-only planning plus selective rereads
cap workspace file-read concurrency to bound sync/status memory
lower workspace sync/status read cap from 16 to 8
lower workspace sync/status read cap from 8 to 4
lower workspace sync/status read cap from 4 to 2
try a single-file workspace read cap
switch workspace hash/upload passes to sequential reads
stream sync/status comparison directly against remote hash maps
trim git path-discovery allocations by skipping file_name and extra filter vectors
replace remote hash maps with sorted merge-join planning for sync and status
switch remote hash planning from BTreeMap to HashMap plus final key sorting
hash local files from raw bytes with UTF-8 validation to avoid read_to_string allocations
